description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections, and a combination of white and gray exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent wooden overhang above the main entryway, which is flanked by a stone or concrete porch and steps. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, with a notable bay window section on one side and a smaller balcony area. The layout is sprawling and single-story, with several distinct rooms visible from above, including furnished living spaces. The roof is mostly flat, providing potential for rooftop use or solar panel installation. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, white and gray walls, large windows, and a wooden front overhang. The design is clean, geometric, and features a prominent entryway and bay window.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a wooden overhang, stone porch, and large windows; interior rooms and furnishings are partially visible.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the bay window section, asymmetrical window placement, and the overall depth of the house.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the flat roof expanse, balcony area, and additional windows; the geometric layout is prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roof, more windows, and the rear portion of the house with minimal decorative features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay window and large panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wooden overhang, stone porch, steps, and a simple door; minimal decorative elements.
